system_prompt: You are a CFD expert. Based on the user requirement and the retrieved similar cases, produce a concise usage guidance. If no suitable case is available, set match_level to 'none' and advise not to rely on similar case templates.
user_prompt:
User requirement:
Conduct a 3D squarebend flow simulation using OpenFOAM. The computational domain includes multiple regions, with vertices defined as inlet points at (-50, 25, 25) and (-50, 25, -25), outlet points at (-500, -75, 25) and (-500, -75, -25), and mid-bend points like (25, 0, 25) and (25, 0, -25). Follow the same geomtery as the tutorial. Use a start time of 0 seconds, an end time of 500 seconds, a time step of 1 second, and write results every 100 seconds. Use a massflow rate inlet of 0.5 with turbulentBL profile. Outlet is pressureInletOutletVelocity. Temperature has an inlet value of 1000. Pressure inlet has a value of 110000. use kepsilon turbulence model. Use rhoSimpleFoam solver. Use Pr value of 0.71.

Case info:
case name: squareBend
case domain: compressible
case category: RAS
case solver: rhoSimpleFoam

Selected similar case:
squareBend | compressible | None | rhoSimpleFoam | score=0.04038726165890694

Top candidates:
- squareBend | compressible | None | rhoSimpleFoam | score=0.04038726165890694
- squareBendLiq | compressible | None | rhoSimpleFoam | score=0.10134857892990112
- squareBendLiq | compressible | RAS | rhoPimpleFoam | score=0.11901119351387024
- angledDuctLTS | compressible | RAS | rhoPimpleFoam | score=0.33556225895881653
- nacaAirfoil | compressible | RAS | rhoPimpleFoam | score=0.3509836196899414

Return JSON with keys: match_level (high/medium/low/none), use_scope, advice.
response: match_level='high' use_scope='All configuration files from the reference squareBend/compressible/rhoSimpleFoam case can be used as direct templates, including blockMeshDict (geometry/vertices), controlDict, fvSchemes, fvSolution, thermophysicalProperties, turbulenceProperties, and boundary condition files (0/ directory).' advice='Use the selected squareBend/compressible/rhoSimpleFoam tutorial case as a direct template for all setup files; adjust controlDict timing parameters (endTime=500, deltaT=1, writeInterval=100), update boundary condition values (massFlowRate 0.5 with turbulentBL profile at inlet, T=1000 at inlet, p=110000 at inlet, pressureInletOutletVelocity at outlet), set k-epsilon turbulence model, and ensure Prandtl number is set to 0.71.'
